title: humularia bequaertii
intro: Humularia bequaertii, also known as the African cat's claw, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Humularia bequaertii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the roots and leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
